meta.title: DEF CON 32 - V2GEvil: Ghost in the Wires - Pavel Khunt & Thomas Sermpinis aka  Cr0wTom
meta.description: This research aims to enhance electric vehicle cybersecurity by uncovering vulnerabilities in the Electric Vehicle Communication Controller (EVCC), crucial for charging communication. We've developed a specialized security tool after examining electric vehicle charging ports and On-Board Charging (OBC) protocols, with a focus on ISO 15118 standards.
